FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: New Features!
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Expands the scope of the mod and adds more levers to change how it plays, as well as a couple of bugfixes.

patchNoteLines.li: You can now send animals to settlements one at a time, instead of having to drop off a breeding pair together
Animals can be sent to settlements by transport pod
Fish integration: with Odyssey active, settlements will have access to fish depending on their biome and water access

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Merc Update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Restricts the animals you can choose in the Unit Designer to only those that the player's Empire has access to.

patchNoteLines.li: Restricts the list of animals that the player can assign to mercs
